notifications-disabled-description: Tap here to enable notifications in your device's settings page
onboarding-info-1: Enter your daily transactions to gain powerful insights into your spending habits
onboarding-info-2-1: You can always edit this later
onboarding-info-budget: Transactions added to {app} are automatically tracked in your budget, giving you a clear view of your spending habits
onboarding-info-3: Keep your data backed up and synced with Google Drive
accent-color-description: Select a color theme for the interface
battery-saver-description: Optimize the UI to increase performance and save battery

rate-app-subtitle: Share your feedback with the developer to help improve {app}
rate-app-privacy: Only the stars, feedback, and date will be shared.
rate-app-privacy-email: Only the stars, feedback, (email if provided), and date will be shared.
exchange-rate-notice-description: The exchange rates displayed within this app are for informational purposes only and should not be used for investment decisions. These rates are estimates and may not reflect actual rates. By using this app, you acknowledge that you understand and accept these limitations and that you assume full responsibility for any decisions made based on the information provided within the app.
collect-description: Have you collected the amount you lent?
settle-description: Have you paid and settled your debt?
remove-skip-description: Remove the skipped payment on this transaction?
remove-payment-description: Remove the payment on this transaction?
discard-changes-description: Are you sure you want to discard your changes?
erase-everything-description: All Google Drive backups will be kept
erase-everything-warning: Are You Sure You Want to Erase Everything?
erase-everything-warning-description: All data and preferences will be deleted!
manage-syncing-info: Manage the syncing of data between multiple devices. May incur extra data usage.
overwrite-warning: This will overwrite all current data
change-limit-warning: Changing the backup limit to a smaller number will remove any past backups that are currently stored, if they exceed the limit, everytime a backup is made.
load-backup-warning: This will replace all your current data!
category-to-transfer-all-transactions-to: Category to transfer all transactions to
merge-into-description-categories: This will transfer all transactions to the new category and erase the old category
sign-in-error-description: Check your connection and try again
elete-budget-added-warning: All transactions belonging to this budget will no longer be connected to a budget.

translations-help: If you would like to help with translations, please email
backup-found-description: Would you like to restore a backup?
privacy-policy: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
unlimited-budgets-and-goals-description: Create more than 1 budget, goal, or loan
past-budget-periods-description: View spending breakdowns of past periods
full-statistics-description: View financial breakdowns of past periods
full-customization-description: Icon packs, icon shapes, color picker
google-drive-backup-disclaimer: Google Drive is used to backup your data. Please login to your Google account to continue.
category-limits-description: Set a category limit to allocates a specific amount or percentage of your total budget to a category. Once set, you can track your progress toward the limit throughout the budget period.
added-budget-description: This budget will only include transactions that have been added to it
google-drive-backup-description: All backups are created on your personal Google Drive and is not accessible to the developer. Read the Privacy Policy for more details.
icon-suggestion-details: Can't find an icon you want? Suggest some and they can be added!
icon-suggestion-privacy: Only the suggestion and date will be shared.
preview-demo-description: Take a tour of the app's interface and features using randomly generated sample data. Exit the preview whenever you like.
preview-demo-warning: Preview Demo is currently active, and auto-generated data is being used. It is not recommended to use the application in Demo mode, as it may lead to data loss. To remove generated data and exit Preview Demo, tap here.
not-available-in-preview-demo-descriptio: Disable Preview Demo mode to use this feature
move-to-other-account-button: Move Transactions To Another Account and Delete
no-addable-budgets: No budgets to add transactions to
delete-budget-added-warning: Transactions added to this budget will no longer be linked to this budget. They will not be deleted.
expenses-only-description: Only expenses can be added to a budget
delete-category-question-description: This will delete all transactions associated with this category.
delete-category-merge-warning: Deleting a category will delete all transactions in this category. Move transactions to another category to avoid this.
delete-account-question-description: This will delete all transactions associated with this account
delete-account-merge-warning: Deleting an acount will delete all transactions in this account. Move transactions to another account to avoid this.
delete-sync-backup-warning: To prevent synchronization issues between clients, it's a good idea to sync all other active devices before deleting.
title: Title
date-format-description: Enter the pattern that matches the format of your dates. This tells the system how to correctly interpret incoming date data. If your CSV already uses a standard date format (such as those shown in the import template), you do not need to provide a custom format.
error-getting-products-description: There was an error connecting to the app store. Please try again later.
error-processing-order: There was an error processing your purchase. Please try again.
biometrics-disabled-description: Enable biometrics in the settings page and try again
biometrics-error-description: There was an error using the devices biometrics
developer-message-1: Financial well-being matters to all of us, and we're here to support your journey towards better money management. That's why we offer you premium features at no cost. The premium popup will appear, but you can dismiss it to access the locked feature
developer-message-2: However, if possible, consider supporting the development. At only one coffee ☕ a month, your support plays a crucial role in this application's future growth. Thank you 😄
no-free-stuff: No, I don't want free stuff
added-only-description-2: Useful for one-time budgets with custom time periods
all-transactions-description-1: All transactions within selected categories and filters
all-transactions-description-2: Useful for long term budgets over multiple periods
export-csv-warning-description: Exporting to CSV should not be used as a backup of data. Budgets and detailed app data is not exported in the CSV! Please use 'Google Drive' or the 'Import/Export Data File' settings instead.
bill-splitter-info: The bill splitter will split a bill you paid for amongst the people who purchased items. You can easily keep track of who owes you certain amounts of money.
name: Name
who-are-you-description: You should be the one who paid the bill
reset-bill-description: This will delete all items in the current bill
daily-notification-type-if-not-opened: If the app was not already opened today
consider-csv-template: Try again and consider using the provided CSV template
use-emoji-details: Select an emoji of your choice as the icon
enter-google-sheet-url-description: Ensure anyone with the link can view your Google Sheet and it is set to public
create-template-copy-description: Make a copy and save it to your Google Drive. Edit the sheet with your data and import it!
account-to-transfer-all-transactions-to: Account to transfer all transactions to
merge-into-description-accounts: This will transfer all transactions to the new account and erase the old account
savings-goal-description-1: Add income transactions to this goal
expense-goal-description-1: Add expense transactions to this goal
include-income-description-1: Income transactions will be included in the budget
include-income-description-2: The spending budget total will decrease with income
added-to-other-budgets-description-1: Transactions you added to another budget will also be included in this budget
include-debt-and-credit-description-1: Lent and borrowed transactions will be included in the budget
added-to-goal-description-1: Transactions you added to a goal will also be included in this budget
delete-goal-warning: Transactions added to this goal will no longer be linked to this goal. They will not be deleted.
upcoming-transaction-type-description-2: Does not count towards your total unless marked 'Paid' or 'Deposited'
subscription-transaction-type-descriptio: Recurring transaction that will be shown on the subscriptions page
Does not count towards your total unless marked 'Paid' or 'Deposited'
repetitive-transaction-type-description-: Does not count towards your total unless marked 'Paid' or 'Deposited'
Next transaction generated when current marked 'Paid' or 'Deposited'
mark-transaction-help-description: Mark a special transaction by tapping the action button in the transaction entry
increase-budget-warning-description: Stick to your budget to maintain financial health. Increasing your budget can hinder your financial goals.
major-change-1-1: Enable the new income budget transaction filter + more transaction filters for more personalized budgets
major-change-2-1: Exclude specific categories from your budget
major-change-3-2: Add transactions to goals and track your progress
major-change-5-1: Emojis can be used as a category icon
select-primary-currency-description: You can always add more accounts with different currencies later
balance-correction-description-1: Include account transfers and account correction transactions
balance-correction-selected-info: Please use the budget transaction filters to modify whether to include the Balance Correction category
period-cycle-picker-description: This will apply to the homepage [Income and Expenses], [], [Pie Chart], and the [All Spending] page.
major-change-7-1: Select a custom period or spending cycle to view your homepage statistics and all spending summary
provide-email-question-description: If you provide your email, the developer can contact you about your suggestion!
major-change-9-1: Import/Export full data file backups in Settings
major-change-10-1: Customize the homepage banner widget size in the Edit Home page
data-overwrite-warning-description: Importing data will overwrite all current data!
select-backup-file-description: Please select your backup [.sqlite] or [.sql] file
database-corrupted-description: Your database is corrupted. You may have imported the wrong file.
delete-subcategory-question-description: This will remove the subcategory tag from all transactions associated with this subcategory.
delete-subcategory-merge-warning: Deleting a subcategory will remove all transactions from this subcategory. Move transactions to another subcategory to avoid this.
select-the-main-category-for-this-subcat: Select the main category for this subcategory
make-subcategory-description-categories: This will move all transactions to the new category and label them with this subcategory
major-change-11-1: Organize your transactions into categories of categories
major-change-12-1: New accounts list summary homepage section
subcategory-to-transfer-all-transactions: Subcategory to transfer all transactions to
merge-into-description-subcategories: This will transfer all transactions to the new subcategory and remove the old subcategory
make-main-category-description: This will move all transactions from the main category to a new main category
subcategories-description: Create subcategories to further organize your transactions the way you want it
bill-splitter-multiplier-description: Enter a value that will be multiplied to every item in the bill splitter. Useful if tax is applied on each item.
cannot-display-graph-for-current-time-pe: Cannot display graph for current time period.
erase-synced-data-and-cloud-backups: Erase Synced Data And Cloud Backups
erase-cloud-data-description: Login to your Google account and delete backups located under 'Sync' and 'Backups'
add-attachment-description: Attachments are added to your Google Drive
major-change-14-1: Attach photos or files to transactions via Google Drive
account-label-description: Add account label for all transactions
drag-and-drop-categories-to-rearrange: Drag and drop categories to rearrange
auto-pay-transactions-description: Automatically mark overdue transactions as paid
major-change-15-1: Quickly duplicate frequent transactions, transfer balances across accounts and more
enabled-in-settings-at-any-time: This can be enabled in the settings at any time
track-installments-description: Create a goal to track payment progress overtime. Add transactions to your goals to track your progress.
major-change-16-1: Revamped the all spending page with spending period history
update-both-transfers-question-descripti: A balance transfer consists of 2 transactions. Would you like to update both?
delete-both-transfers-question-descripti: A balance transfer consists of 2 transactions. Would you like to delete both?
paid-date-description: When a transaction is manually marked
remove-link-description: Note: Attachments will *not* be deleted from your Google Drive
auto-pay-description: If enabled, any overdue transaction (a transaction dated before the current date) is automatically marked as paid when the app is initially opened.
why-is-auto-login-disabled-on-web: Automatic login is not possible on the web app. This is a limitation imposed by Google.
decimal-precision-edit-account-info: You can change the amount of decimals by editing a specific account
balance-correction-category-info: Transactions in this category do not contribute to total income and expense calculations but factor into net total spending. Feel free to customize this category as you like.
delete-loan-warning: Transactions added to this loan will no longer be linked to this loan. They will lose their interest and initial payment tags. The transactions will not be deleted.
missing-installment-period-and-amount: Please select a payment length or amount
all-spending-description: Your spending statistics all in one place
in-app-subscription-terms-1: Yearly and Monthly subscriptions renew automatically and charge immediately. Cancel anytime
change-loan-amount-tip-lent: To change the total amount, add a transaction 'Paid' record to the loan.
change-loan-amount-tip-borrowed: To change the total amount, add a transaction 'Collected' record to the loan.
major-change-17-1: Track lent and borrowed money over a period of multiple repayments
set-to-current-date-and-time: Set to current date and time
select-an-entry-to-set-custom-exchange-r: Select an entry to set a custom exchange rate. Note: All exchange rate calculations use USD as a reference.
consider-rating: Consider leaving a review if you enjoy the app 😄 Thank you!
include-expense-description-1: Expense transactions will be included in the budget
include-expense-description-2: The saving budget total will decrease with expenses
savings-budget-description-1: Track your income and budget your savings
expense-budget-description-1: Track your expenses and budget your spending
add-record-using-plus-button: Add a record using the + button.
decimal-precision-description: Decimal places for transaction amount rounding
total-offset-description: Offset the total of the loan by entering an amount. Useful if the loan has accumulated interest or other unaccounted for costs increasing the total.
deep-linking-description: Automate the insertion of transactions using app URLs. Tap to learn more and view the documentation.
no-outgoing-within-period: No outgoing transactions within selected time period
no-incoming-within-period: No incoming transactions within selected time period
no-expense-within-period: No expense transactions within selected time period
no-income-within-period: No income transactions within selected time period
restart-required-to-load-backup: An app restart is required to load data from a backup
refresh-required-to-load-backup: An webpage refresh is required to load data from a backup
change-currency-description: The app currency is related to the selected primary account. Edit the account to change the currency.
transaction-list-home-description: Lists the last 7 days containing a transaction
applies-when-switching-tabs-in-the-homep: Applies when switching tabs in the homepage transactions list
and-press-the-lock-to-try-again: and press the lock to try again
transaction-no-longer-available: The transaction was deleted and is no longer available to restore
the-original-category-has-been-deleted: The original category has been deleted and the transaction cannot be recovered
major-change-18-1: View a list of recently deleted/modified transactions
major-change-19-1: View your transactions on a calendar
indefinite-loans-description: Track the difference of ongoing loan transactions with friends
restore-purchases-help: If you have trouble restoring your purchases, please contact the developer for help or read the FAQ
import-warning-description: Import may fail! Please make sure you have selected a valid Cashew [.sqlite] or [.sql] backup file.
currency-label-description: Show the currency with the account name
use-subcategory-icon-description: If a subcategory is set, use its icon instead of the primary in transaction lists
all-with-balance-correction-description-: Example: Balance correction, and all outgoing/incoming cashflow
change-in-settings-at-any-time: This can be changed in the settings at any time
placeholder-transaction-note: This is a note that is part of the transaction. It is just a placeholder.
initial-input-prompts-full-description: Edit the order and type of questions and related information you will be prompted when creating a new transaction. You can always dismiss this popup at any point when creating a new transaction to edit all details.
category-prompt-skipped-if-set: Skipped if set from title prompt
show-date-time-button-description: Add button for selecting the date & time
sort-all-categories-warning: This action will automatically sort your categories in the selected order, and your current arrangement will be lost. You can freely edit the order of categories afterward.
auth-type-leaving-app-after-1: After Leaving The App For 1 Minute
auth-type-leaving-app-after-5: After Leaving The App For 5 Minutes
auto-decimal-description: Position decimal automatically as the number is entered
frequent-transactions-description: Common transactions from the last 2 months
pinned-transactions-description: Pinned transactions can be selected and quickly duplicated by long pressing (+) from the home page. Customize and manage the pinned transactions list on this page.
unpin-transaction-description: The transaction referenced will not be deleted
general-settings-description: Biometric lock, haptic feeback, edit data
theme-and-style-description: Theme color, icon style, animations, font
edit-navigation-tabs-description: Customize a navigation tab by tapping the shortcut you want to change
sort-in-popup-description: Sort in the "Select Category Popup" grid layout
decimal-precision-instructions-descripti: The decimal precision for each transaction is determined by the account settings
bi-weekly-hint: Change the frequency of the reocurrence cycle by tapping here. "Biweekly" is every "2 weeks"
quarterly-hint: Change the frequency of the reocurrence cycle by tapping here. "Quarterly" is every "3 months"
modify-decimal-precision-hint: Change the amount of decimals for transactions added to this account
primary-currency-selection-hint: Change the primary currency by selecting the primary default account
view-guides-and-faq-hint: View guides and frequently asked questions
edit-category-spending-limits-hint: Set and customize limits for budget categories
add-transaction-hint: Create a new transaction by pressing the (+) button
edit-home-description: Reorder and enable homepage sections. Tap each section for extra customization.
set-primary-account-subtitle: Quickly set the default primary account in the homepage account selector. The primary account's currency is used throughout and is the default when creating a new transaction.
income-transactions-included-automatical: Income transactions are automatically included in "Savings" budgets
expense-transactions-included-automatica: Expense transactions are automatically included in "Expense" budgets
only-valid-transactions-were-marked-as-i: Not all transactions were updated. Only "Default" transactions can be excluded/included.
edit-delete-and-reorder-data-description: For accounts, categories, titles, budgets, goals, loans
tap-section-to-toggle-visibility: Tap a section to toggle visibility
beta-features-description: Beta features are experimental settings you can enable to get early access to upcoming functionality. They may be unstable or incomplete, so you might encounter bugs or changes. Your feedback helps refine these features before they’re officially released.
reset-page-order-description: Reset the order and page visibility to the default?
net-total-style-description: Customize the color of account and net totals
major-change-20-1: Customize the style of all category icons
major-change-21-1: Budget and accounts list home screen widgets
major-change-22-1: Reorder and disable page shortcuts on the More page
major-change-23-1: Added and organized new app settings for extra customization
major-change-24-1: Customize the order and prompts when creating a new transaction
major-change-26-1: Pin commonly used transactions for quick duplication (long press + button)
major-change-27-1: Sort transactions in the "Search" list by date created, date updated, amount, and name
major-change-28-1: Customize the style of the transaction list
logging-info: All logs are stored on-device and not saved across app sessions
manage-your-purchase: Manage your Cashew Pro purchase here
beta-feedback-message: You can provide beta feedback at any time in the About page
welcome-beta-message: Try out new features before an official app release. Please provide feedback and report any issues so they can be fixed. You can leave the beta program at any time in the app store, especially if you experience any major issues.
select-font-file-description: Select a font file to use as the primary font throughout the application
font-file-may-have-not-loaded-correctly: Font May Have Not Loaded Correctly
is-the-file-a-valid-font: Is the file a valid font?
assign-the-column-for: Assign the corresponding table column for
transfer-info: Transfer an amount from one account to another. When a transfer is made, two "Balance Correction" transactions are created: an account "transfer out" and an account "transfer in". Each is a separate transaction and can be edited individually at any time in the transactions list.
correct-balance-info: Correct the total balance of an account to a target amount. A "Balance Correction" transaction will be created ensuring the total amount of the account is equal to the target amount.
group-by-color-description: View totals of same color accounts
tap-to-expand-help-description: Tap a transaction to expand options and mark a transaction by tapping the action
confirm-amount-description: When manually paying scheduled transactions, you will be prompted to confirm the transaction amount
titles-guide-description: Titles speed up transaction entry by auto-completing a corresponding category. Titles will autocomplete the corresponding category when creating a transaction.
budgets-guide-description: A budget sets a planned limit for spending or saving within a period. Budgets break down finances by timeframe, provide insights, and help you track and control your money.
loans-guide-description: Loans can help you track lent or borrowed money. Long-term loans create a balance that changes based on the transactions added.
accounts-guide-description: Every transaction belongs to an account, which represents where your money is stored or spent - like cash, or credit.
categories-guide-description: Each transaction is assigned to a category, which groups the purpose of expenses or income.
goals-guide-description: A goal represents a target amount you want to save or spend over time. The goal defines the total target and transactions added contribute towards a goal's progress
activity-log-description: Review all edits to your transactions - ordered by recently modified with recently deleted transactions recorded alongside.
date-format-derrived: The current date and time format has been derived automatically using a common pattern. This may not always match your data accurately. Please review the parsed values to confirm they are correct. If they are not, specify a custom date format that matches your data.
all-transactions-budget-help: This budget will include all transactions that satisfy the set categories and filters. Edit the budget parameters to change the criteria.
overdue-transactions-banner-description: If there are transactions past due
pin-account-filters-description: Quick access to account filters for transactions
how-to-sync-guide: Syncing occurs on app startup or by 'dragging down' to refresh on the home page
syncing-failed-schema-mismatch-descripti: Incoming data could not be synced. Your app is running an outdated database version. Please update the app or reset syncing from the Account page.
reset-sync-tip: You can reset syncing on the Account page
reset-sync-popup-description: Clears the server sync database to reinitialize syncing between devices. The next device that triggers a sync will set the new baseline. Local data and cloud backups remain intact.
another-device-is-syncing: Another device is currently syncing, please try again later
sync-description: The sync database contains the most current data shared across all platforms
load-sync-data-after-restore-description: You have just restored a backup and automatic cloud syncing is enabled. Would you like to pull the current cloud data?
import-csv-warning-description: CSV file import cannot easily be undone. Please make a backup before importing.
tag-icon-description: Show relating icon for the tag
delete-investment-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this investment?
automatic-price-not-supported-descriptio: Automatic price updates are only available for stocks, ETFs, cryptocurrencies, and bonds. Use manual price updates for this investment type.
no-ticker-linked-description: Link a ticker to enable automatic price updates from market data providers.
no-provider-available: No provider available for this investment type
enter-symbol-or-name: Please enter a symbol or name
